text: Long Path declares offer unconditional, 67.75% control.
PUSU deadline for AEW UK REIT plc's approach is today.
Board "deeply concerned" at the Helios Consortium's rejection of StoneX's proposal, which was depriving minority shareholders of the opportunity to realise value.
New addition - approach from TA Associates, no price given.
Deletion - British Land scheme becomes effective.
